Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) r = d['results'][0] for k,v in sorted\(r.items\(\)\): if v and v != 0 and v != '' and v != False: print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json try: d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(d, dict\): print\('Keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]\) if 'data' in d: print\(f'Records: {len\(d[\\"data\\"]\)}'\) if d['data']: print\('Sample:', json.dumps\(d['data'][0]\)[:300]\) elif isinstance\(d, list\): print\(f'Array with {len\(d\)} items'\) if d: print\('Sample:', json.dumps\(d[0]\)[:300]\) else: print\('Type:', type\(d\)\) except Exception as e: print\('Parse error:', e\) print\('Raw:', sys.stdin.read\(\)[:200]\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for c in d: print\(c['commit']['committer']['date'][:10], c['commit']['message'][:80]\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total: {d.get\(\\"meta\\",{}\).get\(\\"total_count\\",0\)} current roles'\) for r in d.get\('objects',[]\)[:2]: p = r.get\('person',{}\) print\(f' {p.get\(\\"name\\"\)} - {r.get\(\\"party\\"\)} - {r.get\(\\"state\\"\)} - {r.get\(\\"role_type_label\\"\)}'\) " echo "" echo "=== GovTrack Votes ===" curl -s "https://www.govtrack.us/api/v2/vote?congress=119&limit=3&order_by=-created")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total votes: {d.get\(\\"meta\\",{}\).get\(\\"total_count\\",0\)}'\) for v in d.get\('objects',[]\)[:2]: print\(f' {v.get\(\\"question\\"\)} - {v.get\(\\"created\\"\)} - {v.get\(\\"result\\"\)}'\) " echo "" echo "=== Congress.gov Votes ===" curl -s "https://api.congress.gov/v3/vote/house/119?limit=3&format=json&api_key=YdbWI0KzqPkIvv9vcx3z6dQpaG6ARB8cSr7HOdWC")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) votes = d.get\('votes',[]\) print\(f'House 119th votes: {len\(votes\)}'\) for v in votes[:2]: print\(f' {v.get\(\\"question\\"\)} - {v.get\(\\"date\\"\)} - {v.get\(\\"result\\"\)}'\) " echo "" echo "=== OpenSecrets ===" curl -s "https://www.opensecrets.org/api/?method=getLegislators&id=NJ&apikey=DEMO&output=json")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) r = d.get\('response',{}\).get\('legislator',[]\) print\(f'NJ legislators: {len\(r\)}'\) for l in r[:2]: a = l.get\('@attributes',{}\) print\(f' {a.get\(\\"firstlast\\"\)} - {a.get\(\\"party\\"\)} - {a.get\(\\"phone\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total voters: {d.get\(\\"meta\\",{}\).get\(\\"total_count\\",0\)}'\) for v in d.get\('objects',[]\)[:3]: p = v.get\('person',{}\) print\(f' {p.get\(\\"name\\"\)} voted {v.get\(\\"option\\",{}\).get\(\\"value\\"\)} on {v.get\(\\"vote\\",{}\).get\(\\"question\\",\\"\\"\)[:60]}'\) " echo "" echo "=== GovTrack Member Detail ===" curl -s "https://www.govtrack.us/api/v2/person/412573")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Name: {d.get\(\\"name\\"\)}'\) print\(f'Fields: {list\(d.keys\(\)\)}'\) print\(f'Roles: {len\(d.get\(\\"roles\\",[]\)\)}'\) if d.get\('roles'\): r = d['roles'][0] print\(f'Current role: {r.get\(\\"role_type_label\\"\)} - {r.get\(\\"party\\"\)} - {r.get\(\\"state\\"\)}'\) print\(f'Role fields: {list\(r.keys\(\)\)[:15]}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) v = d['objects'][0] print\(f'Vote fields: {list\(v.keys\(\)\)}'\) print\(f'Question: {v.get\(\\"question\\"\)[:100]}'\) print\(f'Result: {v.get\(\\"result\\"\)}'\) print\(f'Chamber: {v.get\(\\"chamber_label\\"\)}'\) print\(f'Total+: {v.get\(\\"total_plus\\"\)}, Total-: {v.get\(\\"total_minus\\"\)}'\) print\(f'Category: {v.get\(\\"category_label\\"\)}'\) print\(f'Related bill: {v.get\(\\"related_bill\\"\)}'\) print\(f'ID: {v.get\(\\"id\\"\)}'\) " echo "" echo "=== Individual vote records ===")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for v in d['objects']: print\(f'ID:{v[\\"id\\"]} | {v[\\"chamber_label\\"]} | +{v[\\"total_plus\\"]}/-{v[\\"total_minus\\"]} | {v[\\"result\\"]} | {v[\\"question\\"][:80]}'\) " echo "" echo "=== Get voters for a specific vote ===" curl -s "https://www.govtrack.us/api/v2/vote_voter?vote=170938&limit=5&fields=person__name,option__value,person__bioguideid")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total: {d.get\(\\"meta\\",{}\).get\(\\"totalElements\\",0\)}'\) for doc in d.get\('data',[]\)[:3]: a = doc.get\('attributes',{}\) print\(f' {a.get\(\\"title\\",\\"\\"\)[:80]} | {a.get\(\\"postedDate\\",\\"\\"\)} | {a.get\(\\"documentType\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total: {d.get\(\\"totalRecords\\",0\)}'\) for e in d.get\('entityData',[]\)[:2]: r = e.get\('entityRegistration',{}\) print\(f' {r.get\(\\"legalBusinessName\\",\\"\\"\)} | {r.get\(\\"cageCode\\",\\"\\"\)} | {r.get\(\\"registrationStatus\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Fields available: {list\(d[\\"objects\\"][0].keys\(\)\)}'\) for r in d['objects'][:3]: p = r.get\('person',{}\) print\(f'{p.get\(\\"name\\"\)} | {r.get\(\\"party\\"\)} | {r.get\(\\"state\\"\)} | {r.get\(\\"role_type_label\\"\)} | leadership:{r.get\(\\"leadership_title\\"\)} | committees:{len\(r.get\(\\"committee_assignments\\",[]\)\)}'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) r = d['objects'][0] print\(f'All fields: {json.dumps\(r, indent=2\)[:600]}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) r = d['objects'][0] def show\(obj, prefix=''\): for k,v in sorted\(obj.items\(\)\): if isinstance\(v, dict\): print\(f'{prefix}{k}: {{dict}}'\) show\(v, prefix+' '\) elif isinstance\(v, list\): print\(f'{prefix}{k}: [list len={len\(v\)}]'\) else: print\(f'{prefix}{k}: {v}'\) show\(r\) " echo "" echo "=== Recent Votes \(119th Congress\) ===" curl -s "https://www.govtrack.us/api/v2/vote?congress=119&limit=5&order_by=-created&chamber=house")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total House votes 119th: {d[\\"meta\\"][\\"total_count\\"]}'\) for v in d['objects'][:3]: print\(f' #{v[\\"number\\"]} | {v[\\"created\\"][:10]} | +{v[\\"total_plus\\"]}/-{v[\\"total_minus\\"]} | {v[\\"result\\"]} | {v[\\"question\\"][:70]}'\) " echo "" curl -s "https://www.govtrack.us/api/v2/vote?congress=119&limit=5&order_by=-created&chamber=senate")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total Senate votes 119th: {d[\\"meta\\"][\\"total_count\\"]}'\) for v in d['objects'][:3]: print\(f' #{v[\\"number\\"]} | {v[\\"created\\"][:10]} | +{v[\\"total_plus\\"]}/-{v[\\"total_minus\\"]} | {v[\\"result\\"]} | {v[\\"question\\"][:70]}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['results'][0] used=['receipts','disbursements','cash_on_hand_end_period','candidate_id','name','state','debts_owed_by_committee','individual_itemized_contributions','other_political_committee_contributions','incumbent_challenge_full','party'] unused=[k for k in r.keys\(\) if k not in used and r[k] and r[k]!=0 and r[k]!=''] print\(f' USED \({len\(used\)}\): {chr\(10\).join\(\\" \\"+k+\\": \\"+str\(r.get\(k,\\"\\"\)\)[:50] for k in used if r.get\(k\)\)}'\) print\(f' UNUSED \({len\(unused\)}\): {chr\(10\).join\(\\" \\"+k+\\": \\"+str\(r.get\(k,\\"\\"\)\)[:50] for k in unused\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json try: d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) and 'error' in d: print\(f'Error: {d[\\"error\\"]}'\) elif isinstance\(d, list\): print\(f'Records: {len\(d\)}'\) if d: print\(f'Sample: {json.dumps\(d[0]\)[:300]}'\) else: print\(f'Response: {json.dumps\(d\)[:300]}'\) except: print\('Parse failed'\) print\(sys.stdin.read\(\)[:200]\) " echo "---")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json try: d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(d, list\): print\(f'Lambda records: {len\(d\)}'\) if d: print\(f'Sample: {json.dumps\(d[0]\)[:300]}'\) elif isinstance\(d, dict\): if 'data' in d: print\(f'Lambda records: {len\(d[\\"data\\"]\)}'\) if d['data']: print\(f'Sample: {json.dumps\(d[\\"data\\"][0]\)[:300]}'\) else: print\(f'Lambda response: {json.dumps\(d\)[:300]}'\) except Exception as e: print\(f'Error: {e}'\) " echo "---")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json try: d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Quiver: {type\(d\).__name__}, length={len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else \\"N/A\\"}'\) if isinstance\(d,list\) and d: print\(f'Sample: {json.dumps\(d[0]\)[:300]}'\) elif isinstance\(d,dict\): print\(f'Keys: {list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]}'\) except: raw=sys.stdin.read\(\)[:200] print\(f'Quiver raw: {raw}'\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys raw = sys.stdin.read\(\) print\(f'Length: {len\(raw\)}'\) print\(f'Content: {raw[:1000]}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\(f' Records: {len\(d\)}'\)" echo "2. House Trading" curl -s "https://api.quiverquant.com/beta/live/housetrading" -H "Accept: application/json")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\(f' Records: {len\(d\)}, Sample fields: {list\(d[0].keys\(\)\) if d else \\"empty\\"}'\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total: {len\(d\)}'\) print\(f'Fields: {list\(d[0].keys\(\)\)}'\) dates=[r.get\('TransactionDate',''\) for r in d if r.get\('TransactionDate'\)] dates.sort\(\) print\(f'Date range: {dates[0]} to {dates[-1]}'\) officials=set\(r.get\('Representative',''\) for r in d\) print\(f'Unique officials: {len\(officials\)}'\) recent=[r for r in d if r.get\('TransactionDate',''\)>='2026-01-01'] print\(f'2026 trades: {len\(recent\)}'\) recent25=[r for r in d if r.get\('TransactionDate',''\)>='2025-01-01'] print\(f'2025+ trades: {len\(recent25\)}'\) from collections import Counter top=Counter\(r.get\('Representative',''\) for r in d\).most_common\(5\) print\(f'Top traders: {top}'\) print\(f'Sample: {json.dumps\(d[0]\)[:300]}'\) " echo "---" echo "Senate Trading endpoint:" curl -s "https://api.quiverquant.com/beta/live/senatetrading" -H "Accept: application/json")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Total: {len\(d\)}'\) if d: print\(f'Fields: {list\(d[0].keys\(\)\)}'\) if d: dates=[r.get\('TransactionDate',''\) for r in d if r.get\('TransactionDate'\)] dates.sort\(\) print\(f'Dates: {dates[0] if dates else \\"?\\"} to {dates[-1] if dates else \\"?\\"}'\) officials=set\(r.get\('Representative',''\) for r in d\) print\(f'Officials: {len\(officials\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json raw=sys.stdin.read\(\) print\(f'Raw size: {len\(raw\)} bytes'\) d=json.loads\(raw\) print\(f'Records: {len\(d\)}'\) if d: print\(f'First record: {json.dumps\(d[0]\)[:400]}'\) print\(f'Last record: {json.dumps\(d[-1]\)[:400]}'\) " echo "" echo "=== HOUSE endpoint ===" curl -s "https://api.quiverquant.com/beta/live/housetrading" -H "Accept: application/json")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys,json raw=sys.stdin.read\(\) print\(f'Raw size: {len\(raw\)} bytes'\) d=json.loads\(raw\) print\(f'Records: {len\(d\)}'\) if d: print\(f'First record: {json.dumps\(d[0]\)[:400]}'\) ")
